title: Men's March Madness 2026: Ranking the remaining eight teams
content: The regional finals look a little chalky -- with 9-seed Iowa in the mix. Let's rank the teams once more.

title: Predictions, previews for Saturday's Elite Eight
content: ESPN's college hoops crew agrees on which teams will advance from Illinois vs. Iowa and Arizona vs. Purdue.

title: Tiger arrested on suspicion of DUI after car crash
content: Tiger Woods was arrested on suspicion of DUI following a car crash in which he struck another vehicle and rolled his Land Rover, authorities said.

title: Reed, Karaban handle pressure, seal UConn win
content: Tarris Reed Jr. scored 20 points, Alex Karaban added 17, and both made pressure-packed free throws in the final minute that helped second-seeded UConn hold off third-seeded Michigan State 67-63 in the Sweet 16.

title: Diaz thrills L.A. with trumpet entrance, 1st save
content: Dodgers closer Edwin Diaz said it was "pretty fun" hearing his entrance music at Dodger Stadium for the first time before he locked down his first save with his new team in a 5-4 win over the Diamondbacks.

title: Luka picks up 16th technical, faces 1-game ban
content: Luka Doncic was whistled for his 16th technical foul of the season against the Nets and will face a one-game suspension if it is upheld.

title: Vols make third straight Elite 8 with upset of ISU
content: Tennessee used a dominant effort on the glass and a strong second half to put away second-seeded Iowa State 76-62 and earn its third straight trip to the Elite Eight.

title: Sources: Sun sold, will relocate to Houston in '27
content: The Connecticut Sun franchise is being sold to the Fertitta family for a record $300 million to bring the WNBA back to Houston, sources confirmed to ESPN.

title: Cricket legend Ashwin set to join U.S. league MLC
content: One of India's all-time best cricket players, Ravichandran Ashwin will join the San Francisco Unicorns for the upcoming edition of Major League Cricket. Ashwin is the first former Indian national team player to join the U.S. league.

title: Illinois curbs alcohol sales Sat. with Final 4 on line
content: Champaign officials announced an emergency order limiting alcohol sales on the Illinois campus on Saturday night in anticipation of potential property damage and excessive celebrations if the Fighting Illini beat Iowa to advance to the Final Four.

title: 🏀 What's next for eliminated women's teams
content: After Sweet 16 losses, what are the portal priorities for the Tigers Gophers, Tar Heels and Commodores?

title: Duke downs LSU, and all of Friday's results: How half of the Elite Eight was set
content: We've got live analysis and postgame keys for each game from wins from UConn, Duke, Notre Dame and UCLA on Friday.

title: The unlikely rise of Iowa's Ben McCollum, Bennett Stirtz: Division II to Elite Eight
content: Ben McCollum and Bennett Stirtz have won NCAA tournament games four straight years. This is their deepest run yet.

title: What's next for Michigan State, St. John's, Alabama and Iowa State: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: Their NCAA tournament runs ended early and now it's all about next season. Here's how it's taking shape.

title: NBA playoff watch: 76ers, Hornets clash in key seeding matchup
content: Can Philadelphia or Charlotte move into the top six? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Thursday.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

title: This is the deepest USMNT squad maybe ever. Is it enough for the best World Cup result ever?
content: World Cup-winning teams need more than their starting 11, but the U.S. men's national team never had enough good bench options. Maybe that has finally changed?

title: Reranked: Who is the MVP for each of the top Premier League clubs?
content: Based on a simple combination of ability and tactical importance, we've reranked the best players in order at the Big Six Premier League clubs.

title: How Hodgson's 44-year coaching gap at one club compares to others in soccer, NFL, NBA
content: Roy Hodgson is returning to Bristol City as their interim manager, 44 years after they hired him the first time.

title: A former NFL GM's must-draft board for 2026: Tannenbaum pounds the table for 14 prospects
content: From Dillon Thieneman on Day 1 to Jaffer Murphy late on Day 3, Mike Tannenbaum picks the draft prospects he'd want to target across all seven rounds.

title: Latest NFL draft buzz: Ty Simpson's pro day and more
content: How high could QB Ty Simpson get picked? Is Jeremiyah Love really a possibility for the Titans at No. 4?

title: Ted Ginn Jr., AJ McCarron and Chris Redman begin pro coaching careers in familiar spots
content: The UFL comes out swinging in Columbus, Louisville and Birmingham with familiar college stars as coaches.

title: Lehigh Valley IronPigs poke fun at Zack Wheeler's rib removal in rehab promo
content: The Philadelphia Phillies' ace had a rib removed as part of a surgery to remove a blood clot -- and kept it in his closet.

title: 'The KING ... Shot by ME': Caitlin Clark photographs LeBron James at Lakers-Pacers
content: The Fever star was behind the lens as a credentialed photographer at Wednesday's Lakers-Pacers matchup.

title: Women's college hoops: UConn remains title favorite as upsets shake up tourney odds
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Salah eyes Roma after Liverpool exit
content: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah is considering a return to Roma when he moves on in the summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: Ashwin first Indian-capped player in MLC, to play alongside Pakistan’s Haris Rauf
content: Veteran Indian spinner Ravichandran Ashwin is set to make history as the first Indian-capped player in Major League Cricket, joining the San Francisco Unicorns for the 2026 season. Ashwin, a celebrated international cricketer, expressed his excitement about the league's growth and his commitment to helping the Unicorns secure a championship.

title: Perplexity AI CEO shares career advice he got from Sam Altman he wants everyone to follow
content: Perplexity AI CEO Aravind Srinivas credits Sam Altman's advice – 'pursue what comes easy to you but is hard for others' – for his AI success.  A brute-force win in an undergraduate data science contest, despite lacking formal training, solidified his natural aptitude. This intuition, rather than credentials, propelled him to co-found the $9 billion AI company.

title: JD Vance says he’s 'obsessed' with UFOs, believes aliens are actually demons
content: US Vice President JD Vance declared his "obsession" with investigating government UFO files, vowing to uncover the truth during his remaining term. He controversially suggested that these phenomena are not extraterrestrial but rather "demons," aligning with a Christian interpretation of celestial beings.

title: How oil swings and supply snags are testing India's energy resilience
content: How Hormuz disruptions, benchmark volatility and refinery economics are testing India's energy resilience — and why the government moved to shield every pump in the country

title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang on how he manages 60 direct reportees who are mostly engineers
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang leads over sixty direct reports. He avoids one-on-one meetings, favoring collective problem-solving sessions. This approach ensures all team members receive the same information and can contribute. Huang believes in 'extreme co-design' and expects active participation. He is willing to address employees who do not contribute as expected.

title: Pakistan still a base for terrorists targeting India, says US report
content: Pakistan is grappling with a severe surge in terrorist violence, with terrorism-related deaths skyrocketing to 4,001 in 2025, the highest in over a decade. The report highlights the nation as a hub for numerous armed groups, many designated as Foreign Terrorist Organizations, with Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and Balochistan bearing the brunt of the attacks.

title: IPL 2026: Who is Abhinandan Singh? Meet RCB’s debutant who dismissed Virat Kohli twice
content: Uttar Pradesh pacer Abhinandan Singh made his IPL debut for Royal Challengers Bengaluru against Sunrisers Hyderabad, a remarkable rise from tennis-ball cricket just four years ago.  His impressive intra-squad performances, including dismissing Virat Kohli, secured his spot amidst RCB's bowling challenges.  This debut marks a significant moment for the young talent.

title: Meta is rebranding employee titles, roles as it goes AI-native: What it said in memo
content: Meta's Reality Labs is undergoing a significant internal overhaul, rebranding employees as 'AI builders' and forming smaller, AI-focused teams. This strategic shift aims to boost engineering productivity and product quality, with CEO Mark Zuckerberg envisioning AI dramatically transforming work.  These new 'AI pods' will foster cross-functional collaboration, with dedicated leads managing operations and performance.

title: Olympic champion Tom Pidcock survives crash, finishes Catalunya stage
content: Two-time Olympic champion Tom Pidcock escaped serious injury after a frightening crash during stage five of the Volta a Catalunya. The British rider fell into a ravine while descending at high speed. The incident left him briefly stranded, as no one immediately realized where he had crashed. Despite the severity of the fall, Pidcock managed to communicate through his race radio. He was later able to rejoin the race.

title: ‘Complete nonsense’: Nihal Sarin on Dutch No. 1 Anish Giri ‘drawish’ tag before Candidates - Exclusive
content: As the 2026 Candidates tournament approaches, Dutch Grandmaster Anish Giri faces the lingering "King of Draws" stereotype. Indian Grandmaster Nihal Sarin refutes this, highlighting Giri's fighting spirit and recent FIDE Grand Swiss victory as proof of his winning intent. Sarin also offers his predictions for the volatile Open and Women's Candidates fields.

title: Tyson Fury’s 'wild' lion training ahead of Makhmudov fight goes viral
content: Tyson Fury made headlines after being seen handling a live lion during his training camp in Thailand. The video has gone viral just weeks before his upcoming heavyweight bout. The Gypsy King is preparing to face Arslanbek Makhmudov on April 11 at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. The unusual moment, captured in Pattaya, showed Fury calmly walking the animal on a chain and even petting it, drawing attention from fans worldwide.

title: Delhi civic fines set for overhaul; fines for dogs without leash set at Rs 1,000
content: Delhi is set to significantly increase penalties for various civic violations, including a jump from Rs 50 to Rs 1,000 for letting pet dogs roam unleashed in public. The Jan Vishwas Bill 2025 proposes higher fines for issues like cattle tethering, defacing house numbers, and sanitation offenses, aiming to rationalize penalties and decriminalize minor infractions.

title: Explained: Why ISL clubs want FanCode over Genius Sports as commercial partner
content: Genius Sports and FanCode have submitted bids for Indian Super League (ISL) and Federation Cup commercial rights, with Genius Sports offering a significantly higher amount. While the  All India Football Federation (AIFF) favours Genius Sports' larger upfront offer, ISL clubs prefer FanCode's more sustainable financial structure, leading to a divergence in opinions on the long-term deal.

title: Explained: Why RCB players will wear black armbands against SRH in IPL 2026 opener
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru will begin their IPL 2026 title defense against Sunrisers Hyderabad, wearing black armbands to honor eleven fans who tragically died in a stampede following last year's victory. Coach Andy Flower stated that Virat Kohli is in excellent form and "peak of his powers" for the upcoming season.

title: Pakistan cricketer in big trouble! PCB cracks down after ‘Queen’ jibe at Maryam Nawaz
content: Pakistan cricketer Naseem Shah faces a show-cause notice from the PCB for a social media post allegedly criticizing Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz. The tweet, quickly deleted with a hacking claim, was seen as a jab at her security escort during the PSL opener.

title: Cash, care and constant connect: How the 'Didi model' is shaping Bengal’s ballot
content: As the political landscape of West Bengal gears up for the 2026 elections, Mamata Banerjee's government is capitalizing on an extensive welfare system. Programs such as Lakshmir Bhandar and Khadya Sathi are at the forefront, addressing critical issues related to women's empowerment, food access, educational advancement, and job creation for the youth.

title: Dia Mirza slams jingoism in Dhurandhar vs IC 814 row, questions trend
content: Aditya Dhar’s Dhurandhar sequel hit Rs 1,000 crore in 9 days amid buzz. Stars like Aamir Khan haven't seen it; Dia Mirza slams jingoism trend, defends IC 814's balance against backlash. She urges artists to speak up despite trolling. Bollywood quiets post-Dhurandhar 2; South praises, others decry propaganda.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' collection: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 800cr in India
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is officially a box office phenomenon. Directed by Aditya Dhar, the high-stakes espionage thriller starring Ranveer Singh has entered its tenth day, Saturday, March 28, 2026 with record-breaking momentum. After becoming the fastest Indian film to hit the Rs. 1,000 crore global mark in just seven days, the film is now on track to become the highest-grossing Indian movie of all time. With a massive jump expected over the second weekend, trade experts predict the film will cross the Rs. 800 crore mark by Sunday, posing a direct threat to the lifetime record of the first 'Dhurandhar' which is Rs. 894.49 crore.

title: 'I don't talk to half captains': Shubman Gill trolls Ishan Kishan
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Ishan Kishan and Gujarat Titans' Shubman Gill engaged in playful banter ahead of IPL 2026. Kishan will lead SRH in Pat Cummins' absence, with coach Daniel Vettori praising his confident leadership. The duo's light-hearted exchange, including jokes about captaincy and past glories, was well-received by fans.

title: Candace Owens slams Kash Patel cyberattack rumors as false claims
content: Candace Owens dismissed viral claims linking her to the hacking of Kash Patel’s personal email, mocking the accusations and calling them baseless. Authorities confirmed the breach was carried out by an Iran-affiliated group, with no impact on classified systems. As misinformation spread online, Owens referenced Alexis Wilkins, highlighting how speculation and conspiracy theories continue to cloud high-profile cyber incidents.

title: Reet Padda goes private on Instagram after 'Dhurandhar Propaganda' backlash
content: Aneet Padda's sister Reet Padda faces backlash for calling Dhurandhar, The Kerala Story, The Kashmir Files "propaganda" on Instagram. Netizens troll both; Reet goes private, deletes pic amid dating rumors with Pakistani man Fazil Ahmed.

title: Sweet heist: 12 tonnes of KitKat stolen in Europe ahead of Easter
content: Nestle has reported the theft of a significant consignment of KitKat bars, comprising over 413,000 units, en route from Italy to Poland. The 12-tonne shipment's disappearance ahead of Easter could lead to temporary shortages. Investigations are ongoing to trace the stolen chocolate and prevent its unauthorized sale.

title: Jigardan Gadhavi announces retirement; Gujarati singer bids goodbye to playback singing
content: Popular Gujarati singer Jigardan Gadhavi has announced his retirement from playback singing on Ram Navami, concluding a decade-long career. His heartfelt Instagram post expressed gratitude for fan support, leaving many surprised and speculating about his future endeavors. Gadhavi, known for hits like 'Ramo Re' and his work in Hindi films, leaves a significant void in Gujarati music.

title: RCB vs SRH today: Head-to-head, pitch report, weather update
content: IPL 2026 commences with a thrilling encounter between defending champions RCB and 2016 winners SRH. RCB, led by Rajat Patidar, face challenges with key pacers missing, while SRH will be without Pat Cummins. The M Chinnaswamy Stadium is set for a high-scoring affair with clear skies predicted.

title: 'Why was a bizman present?': Cong questions PM Modi over Musk's presence in Trump call
content: The Congress party has sharply criticized Prime Minister Narendra Modi following reports of Elon Musk's alleged presence during a call with US President Donald Trump. The opposition questioned the transparency and protocol of a private businessman participating in a high-level diplomatic discussion on the West Asia crisis.

title: Noida Airport inauguration: Delhi-NCR gets new airport — all you need to know
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated Phase I of the Noida International Airport, a significant addition to India's aviation infrastructure. Developed under a PPP model, this airport aims to enhance regional and international connectivity for the NCR, easing pressure on existing facilities and supporting India's global aviation ambitions.

title: NIMHANS study flags rising parental concern over children’s screen time
content: ‘Parents are increasingly reporting difficulties in regulating their children’s technology use, especially when it begins to interfere with sleep, studies and daily routines’

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Complaint against UDF candidate in Ranni over parody song
content: The complaint is that the candidate, Pazhakulam Madhu, used the song pertaining to the alleged gold theft at Sabarimala in a manner that hurts religious sentiments

title: Accused in CET student murder case arrested over two decades later
content: The case relates to the disappearance and murder of Shyamal Mandal in 2005; accused Durga Bahadur, who had been living under a fake identity, was arrested by the CBI from Nagpur

title: Watch: Iran war: Yemen’s Houthis confirm launching attack on Israel
content: Yemen’s Houthi rebels have confirmed launching an attack on Israel amid escalating tensions in the Iran war. The development signals a widening of the conflict, raising fears of a broader regional escalation in the West Asia

title: Minister Seethakka defends Cheyutha pension scheme in Telangana, rejects Opposition’s claims
content: The Panchayat Raj and Rural Development Minister said that nearly 1 lakh new pensions, including for dialysis and AIDS patients, have been sanctioned since the government took office

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: PM Narendra Modi to hold roadshow in Thrissur on March 29
content: 900-metre- stretch road show in Swaraj Round to host high-voltage NDA campaign; traffic curbs in place across city

title: Strict guidelines for Asramam Sri Krishna Swamy temple festival
content: Central to these directives is the strict adherence to captive elephant management rules, with the Collector ordering the deployment of a special mobile squad to monitor the animals throughout the festivities

title: 6-year-old girl abducted, murdered
content: The victim was the daughter of a labourer hailing from Assam, and lived with her parents in a shed near Vittasandra in Begur.

title: Odisha BJP MLA fires rounds in the air from his personal security officer’s gun
content: Nabin Kumar Jain, the Titlagarh MLA, as a people’s representative, firing shots in public is a serious crime, says BJD leader and former Minister Tukuni Sahu.

title: ‘Theatre should make efforts to retain old audience, attract new one’
content: He was responding to the honour after being conferred with the ‘Abhinaya Bharathi Award’ on the occasion of World Theater Day

title: AIMIM, AJUP flag poor socio-economic condition of Bengal Muslims, aim to erode Trinamool’s minority support
content: AIMIM led by Asaduddin Owaisi and AJUP of Humayun Kabir have decided to form an alliance for the upcoming Assembly polls in West Bengal. They accuse Trinamool Congress of depriving Muslims of proportional representation either in jobs or in politics.

title: Man abducted in a case of mistaken identity, assaulted
content: The accused, who were armed with lethal weapons and arrived in an autorickshaw, were reportedly targeting a man identified as Nataraj alias Nata.

title: Unified voice in Assembly backs Amaravati as permanent capital of A.P.
content: NDA legislators voice strong support for granting permanent legal status to Amaravati as the State capital, while recalling farmers’s sacrifices

title: University faculty member in Bengaluru booked for Islamophobic remarks, suspended by management
content: According to a complaint, the professor allegedly targeted a student, Affan, calling him a ‘terrorist’ at least 13 times during a class which had around 60 students

title: Congress responsible for BJP rise in Assam: AIUDF chief Mohammed Badruddin Ajmal
content: The Congress lost power because it created a foothold for the BJP, says Mr. Ajmal, accusing Tarun Gogoi and Rahul Gandhi of handing Assam to the BJP on a platter

title: TDP’s blood donation camp in Kuwait received  overwhelming support, says Palla
content: The State party president states that the 44th Foundation Day celebrations will be observed with enthusiasm across the globe, with events planned in nearly 90 countries—from the United States to Australia—including dedicated programmes in 25 cities across the U.S.

title: Gobar gas plants at homes provide shield to residents of Belagavi’s Kattanbavi amid cylinder shortage
content: Most of the houses in this village of around 1,200 people have gobar gas plants; they were set-up 30-35 years ago, but are still functioning

title: Kerala boosts hydel output amid poll season as dam levels drop to 44%
content: KSEB data indicate that current storage across all hydel dams is sufficient to generate 1,821.7 MU of power

title: NMC launches online feedback system for undergraduate medical students
content: Anonymous student feedback form to assess medical college infrastructure, teaching quality and clinical training

title: Traffic management of unpredictable Zojila Pass comes under scanner as avalanche toll touches 7
content: Body of a missing person recovered on Saturday while another dies in hospital; authorities issue fresh avalanche warnings; officials question traffic timing and mixing of light and heavy motor vehicles in one of the most dangerous highway in the country

title: Congress raises questions over Elon Musk ‘joining’ Trump-Modi phone call on West Asia crisis
content: The Congress questions whether the call was truly about the West Asia crisis or some ‘business’ agenda and asks why the Modi government did not disclose Musk’s presence on the call

title: A.P. Assembly passes resolution seeking legal status for Amaravati as the State capital
content: Resolution seeking amendment to Section 5 (2) of A.P. Reorganisation Act sent to Lok Sabha, Rajya Sabha and Union Home Minister; YSRCP MLAs remain absent in the Hosue

title: Iran Strikes Kuwait, Dubai As President Issues Warning To Gulf Neighbours
content: In a statement, the Guards said that the strike was carried out using home-grown ballistic missiles, such as Qadr 380 cruise missiles, which have a range of 1,000 kilometres.

title: Nashik 'Godman' Tried To Influence Maharashtra Cabinet Picks: Opposition
content: An opposition leader said the self-styled godman was in contact with state NCP president Sunil Tatkare and tried to ensure that an MLA was not made a minister.

title: Adani Defence And Aerospace Delivers First Batch Of 'Prahar' Guns To Indian Army
content: The 7.62 mm-calibre weapons are part of a larger order of over 40,000 guns and have been produced in India under the 'Make in India' programme.

title: 2 India-Bound LPG Tankers Cross Strait Of Hormuz
content: The US-Israeli war against Iran has all but halted shipping through the strait, but Iran said this week that "non-hostile vessels" may transit the waterway if they coordinate with Iranian authorities.

title: Delhi Man's Date Turns Into Nightmare: Kidnapped, Robbed Of Rs 7 Lakh
content: The victim, Anuroop Narula, said that a girl with a profile named 'Sherry' on a dating app called '3F' invited him to meet at Delhi's Nehru Place area.

title: "Welcome To Hell": Iran Daily's "Coffin" Warning For Potential US Ground Invasion
content: The warning comes as US media reported on Friday that the United States is considering the deployment of up to 10,000 additional troops to the Middle East.

title: Telangana Man Dies By Suicide, Parents Get Him 'Married' Every Year For 23 Years
content: In Telangana's Mahabubabad district, Lalu and Sukkamma have been performing a wedding ceremony every year for their son, Ram Koti, who died in 2003

title: Iran War LIVE: Iran-Backed Houthis Claim First Missile Launch On Israel
content: The war in the Middle East began when the US and Israel conducted strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and other senior leaders.

title: Butterfly Species Discovered In Arunachal Pradesh Named After Singer Zubeen Garg
content: A newly identified butterfly species discovered in Arunachal Pradesh has been named after Assamese music icon Zubeen Garg, highlighting both the region's rich biodiversity and the enduring cultural legacy of the celebrated singer.

title: On Amit Shah's 'Chargesheet' Against Party, Trinamool's "Trial Over" Retort
content: The Home Minister said Bengal, being a border state, is crucial for the country's security, which is being threatened by "infiltrators".

title: Man, 40, Hacked To Death During Ram Navami Procession In Jharkhand: Cops
content: A 40-year-old man was hacked to death during a Ram Navami procession in Jharkhand's Hazaribag district, police said on Saturday.

title: Pakistan Still Sheltering Terrorist Groups Targeting India, Warns US Report
content: Lashkar-e-Taiba, responsible for the 2008 Mumbai attacks, and Jaish-e-Mohammed, linked to the 2001 attack on the Indian Parliament, continue to operate from Pakistani territory.

title: MiG-29 Fighter Jets To Become More Lethal With ASRAAM Missiles
content: The Ministry of Defence issued a request for proposals on March 25 for the integration and testing of the ASRAAM on the MiG-29 UPG variant.

title: Sure Bet? Lottery Baron's Family Involved In 3 Parties In Tamil Nadu, Puducherry
content: Santago Martin's wife is contesting from the DMK in Tamil Nadu and his son has launched his own party, which is fielding candidates in Puducherry. His son-in-law is part of actor-politician Vijay's TVK.

title: No Shortage Of Fuel And Gas In J&K: Omar Abdullah
content: Addressing the media after attending a virtual meeting with Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Friday, Omar Abdullah appealed to people not to fall prey to rumours.

title: 5 Bihar Teachers Found Drunk While On Educational Tour With Students
content: According to police, the teachers had traveled to Nepal as part of a tour group of school students under the Chief Minister's 'Bihar Darshan' Scheme. The allegedly drunk teachers were arrested during a security check at the Bhimnagar checkpost while

title: New Front In Middle East War As Yemen's Houthis Launches Missile At Israel
content: The attack came after the Yemeni group had threatened to join the regional war if its ally, Tehran continued to be attacked or if more countries joined the conflict.

title: ‘Bangaru Babu’ held with gold worth Rs 2.3 crore; 1.4 kg seized at Delhi airport
content: Sudhakar Reddy Udumula is the Editor (Investigation) at the Times of India, Hyderabad. Following the trail of migration and drought across the rustic landscape of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, Sudhakar reported extensively on government apathy, divisive politics, systemic gender discrimination, agrarian crisis and the will to survive great odds. His curiosity for peeking behind the curtain triumphed over the criminal agenda of many scamsters in the highest political and corporate circles, making way for breaking stories such as Panama Papers Scam, Telgi Stamp Paper Scam, and many others. His versatility in reporting extended to red corridors of left-wing extremism where the lives of security forces and the locals in Maoist-affected areas were key points of investigation. His knack for detail provided crucial evidence of involvement from overseas in terrorist bombings in Hyderabad. Read More

title: Men's tournament: Arizona the title favorite as Duke's odds improve to second
content: Duke has claimed its best odds to win the national championship since the tournament began . a solid win over St. John's in the regional semifinals showed +255 to be second on the odds board just behind Arizona (+245) . both teams will be sizable underdogs to the blue Devils and Wolverines in the finals .
